selectedOwner: BND-J05 and BND-J06 plus Sendblue tests and runbooks
decision: Record fixture HTTP 202 as accepted scheduling only. Do not claim processing or handset delivery and do not blindly retry an uncertain external consequence.
evidenceRequired: Typed local fixture for acceptance, rejection, replay, and uncertain consequence.
Provider-owned webhook/account readback before a delivery claim.
limitations: No Sendblue account, webhook, message, recipient, or handset was observed.
nonClaims: HTTP acceptance is not provider processing or recipient delivery.
rollbackRevocation: Stop automatic retry; the Sendblue account owner owns any external cancellation or remediation.
